articles.title: Here's a First Look at J Balvin's Friends and Family Exclusive Air Jordan 1 "Black"
articles.summary: SummaryDuring his 41st birthday celebration, global music icon J Balvin revealed an unreleased, all-black sample of his famous 2020 Air Jordan 1 collaborationThe stealthy sneaker maintains the signature jagged, cut-out design of the original release but swaps the vibrant tie-dye for a sleek black canvas and leather constructionBright neon heel badges—featuring Balvin's smiley face, a pink Jumpman, and a special OMERTA logo—break up the tonal upperJ Balvin's 2020 Air Jordan 1 High is widely remembered as one of the most vibrant, color-packed collaborations in Jordan Brand history. However, it turns out the Prince of Reggaeton had a much darker, stealthier version hiding in the vault. During a recent private celebration for his 41st birthday, Balvin gave the sneaker world a massive surprise

articles.title: Chinese apparel exports to US plunge 53 per cent in Q1
articles.summary: WASHINGTON – Chinese apparel shipments to the US fell by more than half in value in the first quarter of 2026 new trade figures show. The latest figures suggest a continued shift in sourcing away from China and towards other Asian suppliers. New data compiled from OTEXA figures shows US apparel imports from China were [...] The post Chinese apparel exports to US plunge 53 per cent in Q1 appeared first on Apparel Insider .

articles.title: Shift in the System: What Nike's 1,400 Tech Layoffs Mean for the Future of the SNKRS App
articles.summary: SummaryNike has announced the layoff of approximately 1,400 employees globally, heavily concentrated within its technology and global operations divisionsRepresenting nearly 2% of the brand's total workforce, the cuts are a key component of CEO Elliott Hill's ongoing "Win Now" strategy aimed at streamlining operations and reversing sales slumpsA major casualty of the restructuring is the SNKRS app team; Nike has confirmed it is merging its SNKRS and main Nike App engineering teams into a single, unified unitThe digital landscape at the Swoosh is undergoing a massive—and painful—reconfiguration. In its second round of major job cuts for 2026, Nike has announced the layoff of approximately 1,400 employees worldwide. While the footwear giant has experienced several workforce reductions recent

articles.summary: Zalando is expanding its footwear library with the arrival of the New Balance ABZORB collection. To mark its launch, the retailer serves up a new campaign spotlighting the ABZORB 2000 and 2010 models. Known for its assortment of activations that turn playful concepts into inspiring style, Zalando centers the launch around the humble food truck. Drawing a parallel between the appetites of sneakerheads and foodies, the supporting campaign finds the silhouettes on an alternative menu as individuals queue up to get their hands on a pair. Not forgetting to incorporate a series of fresh fits, the visuals also feature a curation of New Balance garments. articles.title: Ferxxo’s Neon Green Salomon XT‑4 OG Is a Raffle‑Only Release
articles.summary: Name: Salomon x Ferxxo XT-4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS”Colorway: “FERXXOCALIPSIS”SKU: L47822500MSRP: $200 USDRelease Date: Available NowWhere to Buy: SalomonThe Salomon x Ferxxo XT‑4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS” brings bold, neon‑bright energy to the trail‑ready silhouette, merging Colombian music superstar Feid (aka Ferxxo)'s music culture with Salomon’s performance DNA.The XT‑4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS” features signature FERXXO green overlays with graphics inspired by Feid’s FERXXOCALIPSIS album artwork, giving the shoe a loud, energetic aesthetic. Synthetic and textile uppers are paired with Salomon’s Quicklace™ system for easy one‑pull tightening. articles.title: NN.07 Collaborates With Grenson on Loafer‑Style Mule
articles.summary: Name: NN.07 x Grenson MuleColorway: BlackSKU: TBCMSRP: $320Release Date: May 13Where to Buy: Grenson, NN.07Grenson has partnered with NN.07 on a footwear collaboration that fuses Copenhagen’s contemporary design ethos with Britain’s storied shoemaking heritage. The project reinterprets the classic moccasin silhouette, drawing inspiration from Grenson’s long tradition of crafting genuine moccasins since the 1960s. The result is a design that celebrates “tradition reimagined,” blending artisanal craftsmanship with NN.07’s forward‑looking design language.Available in limited quantities, the mule is crafted with a soft nappa leather upper and a hand‑stitched gathered apron, delivering a tactile, glove‑like fit. articles.summary: SummaryStrictly limited to a 50-pair production run, this ultra-rare promo sample honors NIGO's deep connection to the foundations of streetwear and sneaker cultureThe heel features custom "2GO" embroidery utilizing the exact same typeface found on the legendary Eminem ENCORE Air Force 1s and boasts the iconic 2001 toe box shape, a classic "Triple White" base, and a milky translucent soleSneakerheads and fans can view one of the 50 pairs right now at the Design Museum gift shop in London alongside the ongoing NIGO exhibitionThe sneaker community just got a massive surprise. articles.title: Hollister x Kappa's Soccer Collection Spotlights Vintage Pitch Specs
articles.summary: SummaryThe collaborative collection features 22 pieces specifically tailored for the summer soccer seasonGarments are highlighted by oversized striped jerseys that feature retro collars and signature tape logos on the sleevesThe capsule expands beyond standard pitch wear to include baggy denim, jorts, and reversible swimwear optionsThe Hollister x Kappa soccer collection has officially arrived, outfitting the summer sports season with a comprehensive 22-piece apparel capsule. Built directly around the aesthetics of archival football kits, the release highlights physical garment construction and vintage-inspired hardware over standard lifestyle basics.At the center of the collaboration are the oversized striped jerseys, which arrive in grey and baby pink colorways.
